testimonials.sarah.text: Integrated booking with automated reminders typically reduces no-shows by 30-40% for salons that switch from manual scheduling.
testimonials.mike.name: Industry Benchmark
testimonials.mike.text: All-in-one POS systems eliminate the checkout bottleneck. Salons report processing payments 40% faster with integrated tip splitting.

faq.question1: How long does it take to set up?
faq.answer1: Most salons are fully set up within a few hours. Our team helps with data migration and staff training.
faq.question2: Do you integrate with existing systems?
faq.answer2: Yes, we integrate with popular payment processors, accounting software, and marketing tools.
faq.answer3: Yes, both you and your customers get mobile apps for booking, payments, and business management.
faq.answer4: We provide 24/7 support via chat, email, and phone. Plus free training for your entire team.

solutions.salons.testimonials.t1.quote: Integrated rebooking and 2-tap checkout typically increase repeat booking rates by 15-20%.
solutions.salons.testimonials.t1.author: Industry benchmark
solutions.salons.testimonials.t2.quote: Automated reminders reduce no-shows by 30-40% on average.
solutions.salons.testimonials.t2.author: Industry benchmark
solutions.salons.testimonials.t3.quote: Salons with integrated website and link-in-bio see faster new-stylist booking adoption.
solutions.salons.testimonials.t3.author: Industry benchmark
solutions.salons.pricing.sub: SMS, website, online cart, QuickBooks sync, and AI are included.
solutions.salons.faqs.q1.q: Can I migrate from my current system?
solutions.salons.faqs.q1.a: Yes—import clients, services, and appointments with guided steps.
solutions.salons.faqs.q2.a: You can start without it; add a reader later for faster checkout.
solutions.salons.faqs.q3.q: Are SMS and the website extra?
solutions.salons.faqs.q3.a: No—both are included with your plan.
solutions.salons.faqs.q4.q: How do tips and commissions work?
solutions.salons.faqs.q4.a: Split tips at checkout and set commission rules per service or retail.
solutions.salons.faqs.q6.q: Does this work for barbers and spas too?
solutions.salons.faqs.q6.a: Yes—use the same template with industry-specific copy and media.
solutions.salons.faqs.q7.q: Is colour tracking included or extra?
solutions.salons.faqs.q7.a: Included free with every NeonO plan. Competitors like Vish ($99/mo) and SalonScale ($49/mo) charge extra — and they don't include booking, POS, or marketing.
solutions.salons.faqs.q8.q: Do I need a special scale for colour tracking?
solutions.salons.faqs.q8.a: No. Use any Bluetooth scale (commodity scales start at $20), voice commands ('Add 30 grams'), or just type the weight manually. No proprietary hardware required.
solutions.salons.sections.colour.title: Stop guessing what colour costs you.
solutions.salons.sections.colour.bullets: Stop losing $200–500/month in unbilled colour — one tap adds the exact cost to the client's bill
Salons waste 15–20% of colour product without realizing it. See your waste % by stylist, by week — and watch it drop
Save every formula to the client's profile with automatic versioning — never guess a mix again
Three ways to input: type the grams, say it with voice commands, or connect any $20 Bluetooth scale
solutions.salons.colour.competitiveCallo: Stop paying $99/month extra for colour tracking.
Vish charges $99/mo. SalonScale charges $49/mo. Neither includes booking, POS, or marketing. NeonO includes colour tracking free — alongside everything else.
solutions.salons.colour.objections.scale: No proprietary hardware — use any $20 scale
solutions.salons.colour.objections.devic: Phone, tablet, or shared colour bar kiosk
solutions.salons.colour.objections.setup: Onboarding wizard gets you mixing in minutes
solutions.salons.beforeAfter.item4.befor: You mixed 80g of colour. 25g went down the drain. You charged a flat fee that didn't cover your product cost. You lost $6.40 and didn't know it.
solutions.salons.beforeAfter.item4.after: You mixed 80g. 8g waste. You charged $27.60 for $18.40 in product. You made $9.20 margin. The formula is saved for next time.
solutions.salons.testimonials.t4.quote: Colour Studio's Repeat Last Formula feature enables 30-second formula recall, ensuring consistent colour results and reducing product waste.
solutions.salons.testimonials.t4.author: NeonO Colour Studio feature
solutions.salons.colour.qualifier: Colour Studio is for salons that do 10+ colour services per week. If colour is a core part of your revenue, you'll see ROI in week one.

pricing.page.whatsIncludedSubtitle: Unlike other platforms, all essential features are built-in at no extra cost.
pricing.page.noCommissionDesc: Custom tip-split rules distribute across your team at checkout — no end-of-week spreadsheets.
pricing.page.freeBookingDesc: Professional booking site included. Others charge $30-50/month extra.
pricing.page.smsMarketingDesc: Automated campaigns and reminders built-in. No add-on fees.
pricing.page.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about pricing and plans.
pricing.page.faq1a: Both Independent and Salon plans include online booking, POS, client management, SMS/email marketing, a free booking website, reports, and mobile app access. Salon plans add multi-chair scheduling, staff management, and commission tracking.
pricing.page.faq2q: How does the per-chair pricing work?
pricing.page.faq3q: Do I really get unlimited chairs after 7?
pricing.page.faq4q: Can I switch between Independent and Salon plans?
pricing.page.faq4a: Yes! You can upgrade from Independent to Salon or downgrade anytime. Changes take effect immediately and we'll prorate your billing accordingly.
pricing.page.faq5a: No setup fees, ever. We also include free data migration from your existing system and personalized onboarding.
pricing.page.faq6a: NeonO includes automatic tip splitting based on rules you set. Tips flow through the same card transaction as the sale, so standard card-processing rates apply to the full amount — we don't add any extra commission on top.
pricing.page.faq7q: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.page.faq7a: We process all major credit cards, debit cards, mobile wallets (Apple Pay, Google Pay), and ACH transfers. Processing fees are industry-standard with no markup.
pricing.page.faq8a: No contracts required. You can cancel anytime with 30 days notice. We believe in earning your business every month.
pricing.page.roiSubtitle: Calculate your true monthly cost including all the essentials that competitors charge extra for.
pricing.page.roiCalcDesc: Quick estimate based on your business size and usage

help.seoDesc: Get help with NeonO. Find answers to common questions about pricing, features, setup, and support.
help.title: How Can We Help?
help.subtitle: Search our knowledge base or browse common questions below
help.supportAvailable: Our support team is available 24/7 to assist you
help.gs.q1: How do I get started with NeonO?
help.gs.a1: Sign up for a free 14-day trial at neono.ca/signup. No credit card required. After signing up, you'll complete a quick onboarding to set up your business profile, then you can start adding services, staff, and appointments immediately.
help.gs.a2: Most salons are fully operational within 2-4 hours. Our guided setup walks you through: business details, service menu, staff profiles, and calendar configuration. We also offer free migration assistance if you're switching from another platform.
help.gs.q3: Can I import data from my current system?
help.gs.a3: Yes! We support data imports from Fresha, Vagaro, Square, and most other platforms. Contact our support team after signup and we'll handle the migration for free.
help.pb.a1: You pay $24.99/month per active seat or service station. If you have 4 seats, that's $99.96/month. After 7 seats, all additional seats are FREE—so 8+ seats is still just $174.93/month total.
help.pb.a2: No. Everything is included: appointments, POS, marketing, SMS, email, website builder, AI analytics, and more. Standard card processing applies through Stripe — no hidden fees, no markup from NeonO.
help.pb.a3: Absolutely. We're month-to-month with no long-term contracts. Cancel anytime from your account settings. No cancellation fees, no questions asked.
help.pb.a4: NeonO includes automatic tip splitting based on rules you set. Tips flow through the same card transaction as the sale, so standard card-processing rates apply to the full amount — we don't add any extra commission on top.
help.fc.q1: Does NeonO work for barbershops and spas, or just salons?
help.fc.a1: NeonO works for all beauty and wellness businesses: hair salons, barbershops, nail salons, spas, medical aesthetics, and more. The platform adapts to your specific business type.
help.fc.a2: Yes. Your customers can book appointments anytime through your custom booking page or embedded widget on your website. They'll receive automatic confirmations and reminders via SMS and email.
help.fc.q3: Does NeonO have a mobile app?
help.fc.a3: Yes, NeonO works perfectly on mobile browsers and can be installed as a Progressive Web App (PWA) on iOS and Android. Your staff can manage appointments, check out customers, and view schedules from their phones.
help.fc.a4: Yes. Multi-location management is included. You can view all locations from one dashboard or switch between locations. Each location has its own calendar, staff, and settings.
help.ts.q1: What kind of support do you offer?
help.ts.a1: 24/7 support via live chat and email. We also have a comprehensive knowledge base with video tutorials. Most questions are answered within 2 hours, critical issues within 30 minutes.
help.ts.a2: Yes. All plans include free onboarding training. We provide video tutorials, live webinars, and one-on-one setup calls if needed. Your staff will be comfortable using NeonO within a day.
help.ts.q3: What if I need help migrating from another platform?
help.ts.a3: We handle it for free. Our team will migrate your customer data, appointment history, and service menu from your old system. Typical migration takes 2-3 business days.
help.sc.a1: Yes. NeonO is SOC 2 Type II certified and PCI DSS Level 1 compliant. We use bank-level encryption, secure cloud infrastructure, and daily backups. Your data is safer with us than on local computers.
help.sc.a2: Yes. For medical spas and aesthetics clinics handling protected health information, we offer HIPAA-compliant configurations and sign Business Associate Agreements (BAAs).
help.sc.a3: You do. You can export all your data anytime in standard formats (CSV, PDF). If you cancel, you retain full access to download your data for 30 days.

security.seoDesc: Learn about NeonO's enterprise-grade security measures, compliance certifications, and data protection practices.
security.title: Enterprise-grade security you can trust
security.subtitle: Your business data and customer information are protected by industry-leading security measures and compliance certifications.
security.soc2Desc: Annual audits ensure our security controls meet the highest industry standards for availability, security, and confidentiality.
security.encryptionDesc: All data is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.3 and at rest using AES-256 encryption with customer-managed keys.
security.hipaaDesc: HIPAA-ready for medical aesthetics clinics, with signed BAAs and audit trails available on request.
security.rbacDesc: Granular permissions system ensures users only access data necessary for their role.
security.pciDesc: Highest level of PCI compliance for secure payment processing and cardholder data protection.
security.infraDesc: Multi-region cloud infrastructure with automated backups, failover, and 99.9% uptime SLA.

pricing.features.salon.commission: Commission tracking, tip distribution, and timesheet export — ready for QuickBooks or Xero
pricing.page.faq2a: Salon plans start at {minChairs} chairs for {minPrice}/month. Each chair costs {pricePerChair}/month for the first {maxBillableChairs} chairs. After that, chairs {maxBillableChairsPlus1} and beyond are completely FREE—no additional cost as you grow. The maximum you'll ever pay is {maxPrice}/month, regardless of team size.
pricing.page.faq3a: Yes! Once you have {maxBillableChairs} chairs, every additional chair is completely free. Whether you have {maxBillableChairsPlus1} chairs or {maxChairs} chairs, you pay the same price: {maxPrice}/month. This makes NeonO incredibly cost-effective for growing salons and multi-location businesses.

enhancedTestimonials.subtitle: Based on industry benchmarks and beta testing with Metro Beauty Supply partners
enhancedTestimonials.t1.quote: Salons using integrated online booking with automated reminders typically see 30-40% fewer no-shows and a significant increase in repeat bookings.
enhancedTestimonials.t1.author: Industry benchmark — Salon Today 2025
enhancedTestimonials.t2.quote: Integrated point-of-sale systems that include tip splitting and instant payouts save front desk staff 15-20 minutes per day on checkout and reconciliation.
enhancedTestimonials.t2.author: Industry benchmark
enhancedTestimonials.t3.quote: All-in-one platforms that combine booking, POS, marketing, and staff management reduce administrative overhead by 10-15 hours per week compared to using separate tools.
enhancedTestimonials.t3.author: Industry benchmark
enhancedTestimonials.t4.quote: Salons that implement colour cost tracking recover an average of $200-500 per month in previously unbilled product costs and reduce waste by 15-25%.
enhancedTestimonials.t4.author: SalonScale industry data

home.canada.title: Built for Canadian salons. Not patched for them.
home.canada.subtitle: Fresha was built for the UK. Vagaro was built for the US. NeonO was built for Canada.
home.canada.casl.title: CASL-Native Consent
home.canada.casl.desc: Every email, every SMS, every marketing touchpoint has Canadian Anti-Spam Legislation consent tracking built in. Not bolted on.
home.canada.tax.title: HST / GST / PST
home.canada.tax.desc: Correct tax calculation by province, automatically. No manual configuration or US-centric tax plugins.
home.canada.privacy.title: PIPEDA Compliant
home.canada.privacy.desc: Canadian privacy law compliance built into every data touchpoint. Your clients' data stays protected under Canadian law.
home.canada.pricing.title: Priced in CAD
home.canada.pricing.desc: No currency conversion surprises. No USD pricing with a Canadian flag sticker. Real Canadian dollar pricing.
home.canada.distributor.title: Metro Beauty Integration
home.canada.distributor.desc: Direct integration with Canada's leading professional beauty distributor. Order products, run dropship stores, access brand education.
home.canada.data.title: Canadian Data Residency
home.canada.data.desc: Your business data and your clients' personal information stored and processed in Canada.
home.noMarketplace.title: Your clients are your clients.
home.noMarketplace.body: Fresha charges 20% on new client bookings through their marketplace — that's a minimum of $6 per client. Vagaro forces your clients to create a Vagaro account before they can book. NeonO doesn't have a marketplace. We don't charge booking commissions. We don't make your clients create accounts. Your revenue is your revenue.
home.noMarketplace.stat: 10 new clients/month × $6 minimum = $720/year in marketplace fees you'll never pay with NeonO
products.colourStudio.name: Colour Studio
products.colourStudio.tagline: Track every gram. Save every formula. Included free.
products.colourStudio.description: Canada's only integrated colour cost engine. Track product usage, save formulas, reduce waste, and bill accurately — all built into your salon platform.
colourStudio.seoTitle: Colour Studio — Track Colour Costs, Save Formulas | NeonO
colourStudio.seoDesc: Canada's only integrated colour cost engine. Track every gram, save every formula, reduce waste by 15-25%. Included free — competitors charge $49-199/month extra.
colourStudio.hero.title: Your colour services are losing money. You just can't see it yet.
colourStudio.hero.subtitle: The average salon wastes 15-20% of colour product without realizing it. Most charge flat fees that don't cover actual product cost. And with zero tracking, there's zero visibility into what colour really costs you.
colourStudio.demo.title: Watch the math happen in real time
colourStudio.demo.subtitle: This is what a colour service looks like when you actually track the cost.
colourStudio.walk.s1.title: Walk-in or appointment — start mixing in seconds.
colourStudio.walk.s1.b1: Quick session flow: search for client, select service type, start building
colourStudio.walk.s1.b2: Client's allergy flags appear automatically — never miss a sensitivity
colourStudio.walk.s1.b3: Previous formulas load instantly — tap 'Repeat Last' to pre-fill ingredients
colourStudio.walk.s2.title: Every gram tracked. Every cost calculated. In real time.
colourStudio.walk.s2.b1: Add ingredients from your product catalog — filtered by brand, type, shade family
colourStudio.walk.s2.b2: Three input methods: type the grams, say it with voice commands, or connect any Bluetooth scale
colourStudio.walk.s2.b3: Cost-per-gram calculates instantly as you add weight — no guessing, no spreadsheets
colourStudio.walk.s2.b4: Unlimited bowls per session — label each one (Roots, Ends, Toner, Highlights)
colourStudio.walk.s3.title: See where your money is going down the drain.
colourStudio.walk.s3.b1: After processing, record leftover product per ingredient in the waste reweigh modal
colourStudio.walk.s3.b2: Waste cost auto-calculated: waste grams × cost-per-gram
colourStudio.walk.s3.b3: Waste trends tracked over time — improving, stable, or worsening — by stylist and by week
colourStudio.walk.s4.title: One tap. Exact cost. On the client's bill.
colourStudio.walk.s4.b1: Push colour charges directly to the appointment ticket — no re-entry, no calculator
colourStudio.walk.s4.b2: Choose your pricing model: flat markup, parts & labour, or threshold with overage
colourStudio.walk.s4.b3: Waste is never on the client's bill — it's tracked internally for your analytics only
colourStudio.walk.s5.title: Never guess a mix again.
colourStudio.walk.s5.b1: Formula saved to the client's profile with automatic version numbering (v1, v2, v3...)
colourStudio.walk.s5.b2: Browse any client's full formula history — filter by service type, date, or stylist
colourStudio.walk.s5.b3: Before, bowl, and after photos linked to each formula record
colourStudio.pricing.title: Three ways to charge for colour. You choose.
colourStudio.pricing.subtitle: Every salon prices colour differently. NeonO supports all three models with live preview.
colourStudio.pricing.flatMarkup.title: Flat Markup
colourStudio.pricing.flatMarkup.desc: Product cost × (1 + your markup %). Simple, predictable.
colourStudio.pricing.partsLabour.title: Parts & Labour
colourStudio.pricing.partsLabour.desc: Same math, framed as a separate line item on the bill.
colourStudio.pricing.threshold.title: Threshold (Inclusive Grams)
colourStudio.pricing.threshold.desc: First X grams included in service price. Overage charged per gram.
colourStudio.compare.title: NeonO vs the standalone colour tools
colourStudio.compare.subtitle: Other salon platforms don't offer colour tracking at all. The only alternatives are separate apps — at separate prices.
colourStudio.ai.title: Our AI is a calculator. Never a colourist.
colourStudio.ai.body: Colour Studio tracks your costs, predicts your usage based on history, and surfaces waste trends. It never recommends colours, formulas, ratios, or products. The creative decisions are always yours. Your artistry. Your expertise. Our math.
colourStudio.ai.rule1: Never suggests colours, formulas, or ratios
colourStudio.ai.rule3: Waste data is for your eyes only — never on client bills
colourStudio.ai.rule4: Allergen flags surface the data — never suggest what to do about it
colourStudio.qualifier.title: Is Colour Studio right for your salon?
colourStudio.qualifier.body: Colour Studio is for salons that do 10+ colour services per week. If colour is a core part of your revenue, you'll see ROI in week one. If you're a blowout bar or barbershop that rarely touches colour — you don't need it, and that's fine. It's there when you're ready.
colourStudio.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
colourStudio.faq.q1.q: Is colour tracking included or does it cost extra?
colourStudio.faq.q1.a: Included free with every NeonO plan. Vish charges $99/month. SalonScale charges $49-199/month. Neither includes booking, POS, or marketing — NeonO does.
colourStudio.faq.q2.q: Do I need a special scale?
colourStudio.faq.q2.a: No. Use any Bluetooth scale (commodity scales start at $20 on Amazon), voice commands ('Add 30 grams'), or just type the weight manually. No proprietary hardware required.
colourStudio.faq.q3.q: Can I use it on a shared colour bar tablet?
colourStudio.faq.q3.a: Yes. Kiosk mode lets you register shared devices with staff PIN authentication. Formulas auto-save every few seconds — if a stylist steps away, they pick up exactly where they left off.
colourStudio.faq.q4.q: Does waste appear on the client's bill?
colourStudio.faq.q4.a: Never. Waste tracking is internal analytics only — it helps you identify waste trends and improve efficiency. Your clients only see the product charge based on your chosen pricing model.
colourStudio.faq.q5.q: How accurate is the cost tracking?
colourStudio.faq.q5.a: Penny-precise. All monetary values are stored in cents (no floating-point rounding errors) and all weights in grams. Cost-per-gram is a database-generated column calculated automatically from purchase price and package size.
colourStudio.faq.q6.a: 11 professional brands with 546+ products pre-seeded, including shade numbers, processing times, developer requirements, and grey coverage ratings. You can also import your own products via CSV.
colourStudio.faq.q7.q: Does the AI recommend colours or formulas?
colourStudio.faq.q7.a: No. Our AI is a calculator and a mirror — it tracks costs, predicts usage from your history, and surfaces waste trends. It never recommends colours, formulas, ratios, or products. Your creative expertise is yours alone.
colourStudio.faq.q8.q: Can I see which stylists waste the most product?
colourStudio.faq.q8.a: Yes. The analytics dashboard shows waste percentage by stylist, by week, with trend indicators (improving, stable, worsening). You can also see adoption rates — who's using Colour Studio and who isn't.
colourStudio.cta.title: Stop losing money on every colour service.
colourStudio.cta.subtitle: Track every gram. Save every formula. Bill accurately. All included in NeonO — no extra cost, no proprietary hardware, no separate app.
colourStudio.beforeAfter.title: See the difference
colourStudio.beforeAfter.without.title: Without Colour Tracking
colourStudio.beforeAfter.without.5: You don't know any of this
colourStudio.beforeAfter.with.title: With Colour Studio
colourStudio.steps.title: How it works
colourStudio.steps.subtitle: From mixing to billing in one flow. Zero guesswork.
colourStudio.steps.weigh.title: Weigh your colour
colourStudio.steps.weigh.desc: Add ingredients to your bowl. Type the grams, use voice commands, or connect any Bluetooth scale. Cost calculates instantly.
colourStudio.steps.track.title: Track the waste
colourStudio.steps.track.desc: After processing, record what's left. See your waste percentage by stylist and by week — and watch it drop.
colourStudio.steps.bill.title: Bill accurately
colourStudio.steps.bill.desc: One tap pushes the exact colour cost to the client's bill. Choose flat markup, parts & labour, or per-gram overage.
colourStudio.steps.save.title: Save the formula
colourStudio.steps.save.desc: Formula saved to the client's profile with automatic versioning. Tap 'Repeat Last' next visit and you're mixing in 30 seconds.
colourStudio.steps.send.title: Send to client to pay
colourStudio.steps.send.desc: Client receives a payment link on their phone. They tap, pay, tip — done. No waiting at the front desk, no card machine needed.
colourStudio.founding: Be among the first 100 salons to use Colour Studio. Priority support and locked-in pricing.
